defaultRule: ON when the pattern appears in the majority of mature web/mobile design systems (Material, Carbon, Polaris, Atlassian) and is required for typical UI work. OFF when the pattern is specialized, advanced, or domain-specific (motion choreography, stroke-based icon systems, layout grid frameworks).

topLevel.label: Color palette
topLevel.description: Primary, secondary, accent, neutral scale, semantic colors.

topLevel.label: Typography
topLevel.description: Font families, size scale, weight scale.

topLevel.label: Components
topLevel.description: Aggregate of all DTCG-common pattern tokens. Subcategories selectable independently per defaultOn rule.

componentPatterns.label: Border radii
componentPatterns.rationale: Universal in modern UI; rounded corners are baseline.

componentPatterns.label: Shadows / elevation
componentPatterns.rationale: Material-style elevation and drop shadows are pervasive across systems.

componentPatterns.label: Transitions (duration + easing)
componentPatterns.rationale: Hover/focus/state transitions are baseline interaction polish.

componentPatterns.label: Z-index layers
componentPatterns.rationale: Modal/dropdown/tooltip stacking requires named layers in any non-trivial UI.

componentPatterns.label: Breakpoints
componentPatterns.rationale: Responsive design is universal; named breakpoints are baseline.

componentPatterns.label: Icon sizes
componentPatterns.rationale: Multi-size icon scale is standard wherever an icon system exists.

componentPatterns.label: Opacity scale
componentPatterns.rationale: Most systems use ad-hoc opacity values; a tokenized scale is specialized.

componentPatterns.label: Blur / filter
componentPatterns.rationale: iOS-style frosted glass and filter tokens are specialized to certain aesthetics.

componentPatterns.label: Motion / keyframes
componentPatterns.rationale: Choreographed motion vocabularies are advanced; transitions cover baseline needs.

componentPatterns.label: Stroke widths
componentPatterns.rationale: Specific to stroke-based icon systems; not relevant when icons are filled or imported.

componentPatterns.label: Grid tokens
componentPatterns.rationale: Layout grids are framework-specific (Bootstrap, Tailwind grid); spacing scale covers baseline needs.
